doctrine.source: Local Instacart item export; raw CSV remains uncommitted.
doctrine.macro_equivalence_threshold: Use a generic alias when the food is the same practical food, the prep state matches, and calories are within about 10% or 10 kcal per 100g with no structural macro difference.
do_not_collapse: whole egg vs yolk or white
pickled vs raw when sodium/prep matters

aliases.alias: village farms sinfully sweet campari tomatoes
aliases.reason: Campari tomatoes are a raw fresh tomato variant; route to the existing generic raw tomato anchor.
Store and organic labels do not change raw cilantro identity.
Scallions and green onions are the same practical raw food.
Store and organic labels do not change raw spaghetti squash identity.

aliases.target_name: Sweet potatoes, orange flesh, without skin, raw
aliases.reason: Grocery wording for raw sweet potato; existing anchor preserves raw state.
Grocery wording for raw broccoli; route to existing broccoli anchor.
Hass avocado variants route to generic edible raw avocado.
Organic label does not change banana identity.
Brand and organic labels do not change blueberry identity.

aliases.alias: happy egg free range large brown grade a eggs
aliases.reason: Brand/housing/color labels route to large eggs; does not collapse to yolk or whites.

aliases.alias: knudsen small curd low fat cottage cheese
aliases.reason: Low-fat cottage cheese routes to existing 2% cottage cheese anchor.

aliases.alias: daves killer bread 21 whole grains and seeds organic bread
aliases.target_name: Dave's Killer Bread - 21 Whole Grains and Seeds
aliases.reason: Exact branded bread variant already exists as a pantry product.

aliases.alias: h e b bakery sea salt tortilla chips
aliases.reason: Plain salted tortilla chips route to generic tortilla chips; brand ignored for macro speed.
Brand-specific coconut water anchor already exists.

aliases.alias: silk almond milk dark chocolate dairy free
aliases.reason: Chocolate almond milk routes to the existing generic USDA chocolate almond milk anchor.
Brand label does not change raw basil identity.

aliases.alias: jennie o ground turkey 93 lean 7 fat
aliases.reason: Leanness is preserved exactly at 93/7.
Bunch is a purchase unit, not a different food.
Purchase quantity wording routes to bananas.

aliases.alias: kroger grade aa large white cage free eggs
aliases.reason: Brand/housing/color labels route to large eggs; does not collapse to yolk or whites.
Bag is packaging; raw lime identity remains.
Brand label does not change raw lemon identity.
Brand-specific applesauce anchor already exists.
Singular spoken form routes to existing raw shallots.
Scallions and green onions are the same practical raw food.
